task_completion.description: Agent logs into the Back Office using the provided PIN.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS Back Office dashboard is visible, or the login screen shows the PIN '1111' being entered.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the User or Employee management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window or tab displaying a list of users/employees (e.g., 'User Explorer' or 'Users') is open in the Floreant POS interface.

task_completion.description: Agent selects the employee 'John Doe' for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user 'John Doe' is highlighted in the user list, or the 'Edit User' window is open specifically for 'John Doe'.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the target key card number into the employee's profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '9876543210' is visible in the 'Magnetic ID', 'Key Card', or similar identification field within John Doe's user profile/edit window.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the updated employee profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save', 'OK', or 'Apply' button in the Edit User window, or the window closes returning to the user list after the number was entered.

integrity.description: Agent must use the Floreant POS graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: All interactions should happen within the Floreant POS application windows. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not just type the answer into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The key card number '9876543210' should be entered into the actual POS software's input fields, not a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent edits the existing employee record rather than creating a fake one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the existing 'John Doe' record in the user list rather than creating a new user from scratch just to fulfill the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target employee: 'John Doe'. Target key card number: '9876543210'. The agent must use the Floreant POS GUI (Back Office PIN: 1111) to assign the key card. Direct database modification (e.g., via terminal to /opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server/posdb) is not allowed.
